name: Firestore
description: Tabularis driver plugin for Google Firestore

settings.label: Service Account JSON Path
settings.description: Optional. If empty, falls back to GOOGLE_APPLICATION_CREDENTIALS or gcloud ADC.

settings.label: Firestore Emulator Host
settings.description: Optional. e.g. localhost:8080. Overrides production endpoint.

settings.label: Schema Overrides Directory
settings.description: Optional. Directory holding per-(project, database) JSON files with schema overrides (required-ness, type corrections, hidden fields, extra fields). Plugin looks up '{project_id}_{database_id}.json' first, falls back to '{project_id}.json'. See docs/schema-overrides.md. Toggle the connection to reload after edits.
